intent: The same split hero, but as a raw Figma export: absolutely-positioned divs, hashed class names, px-everything, a button that is a div wrapping a span, and an image that is a background-image div. The ideal end state is identical to the authored hero — cover with a two-column split (text + image). CAPABILITY GAP: Figma soup carries no semantic/class signals, so the converter recovers almost none of this today. This fixture is the benchmark for the hardest producer.
